items.title: GTA 6 had "all the studios in the world" planning around the Rockstar Games behemoth, A Plague Tale dev says
"GTA is like the ogre" - It's an "odd" year to release a video game, says A Plague Tale studio Asobo
items.summary: A Plague Tale developer Asobo has called Grand Theft Auto 6 an "ogre" as far as its dominance over 2026's release schedule goes. It's the same year its Resonance: A Plague Tale Legacy game comes out, and it joins the crush in late August, a couple of months before GTA 6 crashes in. Read more

items.title: GTA 6 doesn't scare Phantom Blade Zero devs, who just moved their release date closer to Rockstar's: "We don't think about any of this"
items.summary: S-Game is pure poker face to Rockstar's latest offering

items.title: While other games try to avoid GTA 6, Phantom Blade Zero has changed its release date to move closer to it
items.summary: Wuxia-inspired action game Phantom Blade Zero is arguably one of the most anticipated games of 2026, but no game is as anticipated as Grand Theft Auto 6 , as the many calendar shuffles to avoid November have shown. So it was particularly surprising to see Phantom Blade Zero given a release date during June's State o…

items.title: GTA 5 Joins A Subscription Ahead Of GTA 6 Launch
items.summary: Ahead of GTA 6's release this November, GTA 5 is now available on a subscription service, and it's Rockstar's own GTA+. The game's single-player campaign is now included with the GTA+ games library, while GTA+ members on PC can now get GTA Online through the games library. Available on PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC,…

items.title: Phantom Blade: Zero devs couldn't care less about releasing near GTA 6: 'We don't even think of the competition, what matters is how polished the game is'
items.summary: They did care about making the game run as well as possible on lower-end hardware, however.

items.title: As games pile into September to avoid GTA 6, Ghostrunner studio's promising Soulslike Valor Mortis is shifting its release to escape the rush
items.summary: It didn't take much of this year's Summer Game Fest to realise that, in racing to escape the orbit of GTA 6 , the games industry has created a new problem : a September 2026 so packed with releases that it's going to take some dedication - not to mention time and money - for players to get through even a fraction of…

items.title: September Is So Busy For Games That One Of Them Just Got Delayed To Avoid The Others (And GTA 6)
items.summary: With GTA 6 launching in November, developers are trying to line up their releases in the months before and after it, and that's made September 2026 very busy . One September release is now shifting to October due to the pileup of September games. Developer One More Level has announced that Valor Mortis is being dela…

items.title: Fable Reboot Delay Was Disappointing To The Devs, But Avoiding GTA 6 Makes Sense
items.summary: The Fable reboot from Playground Games was planned for release this year, but Microsoft delayed it to February 2027, and the reason for the delay was to give the game the attention it deserves. That's according to Playground GM Ralph Fulton, who told GamesRadar that there was "a little bit of disappointment" when th…
